moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 in full swing
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are underway at the All England Club, with top tennis stars battling it out on the grass courts.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 is serving up ace after ace this week. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Day two of Wimbledon sees more British talent hitting the courts. Fingers crossed for a strong showing from our home-grown heroes!

moments.title: Tour de France kicks off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on July 4, 2026, starting in Barcelona before heading into France for three weeks of intense cycling.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of gruelling climbs and thrilling sprints! The Tour de France 2026 starts in Barcelona this Saturday. Who are you backing for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Stage 1 Focus
angles.copy: The Grande Boucle is almost here! This year's Tour de France kicks off with a team time trial in Barcelona on July 4th. Expect fireworks from day one!

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final at Lord's
moments.blurb: The final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 will be held at Lord's Cricket Ground in London on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Final Excitement
angles.copy: History in the making this Sunday! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final takes place at Lord's. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Women's Sport Highlight
angles.copy: A huge weekend for women's sport! Don't miss the ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final live from Lord's this Sunday. It's set to be a cracker!

moments.title: Lytham Festival 2026 begins
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, one of the UK's biggest live music events, kicks off its five-day run from July 1st to 5th, featuring a diverse lineup of artists.

angles.name: Festival Kick-off
angles.copy: Lytham Festival is back! Five days of incredible live music starts tomorrow. Who are you most excited to see on the lineup?

angles.name: Wednesday Headliners
angles.copy: The countdown is over! Lytham Festival opens its gates tomorrow. Get ready for an amazing start to July's festival season!

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival opens
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival, the UK's only greenfield jazz festival, runs from July 3rd to 5th in East Sussex, featuring a world-class jazz, funk, and soul lineup.

angles.name: Jazz Fest Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for some smooth grooves! The Love Supreme Jazz Festival starts this Friday, bringing the best in jazz, funk, and soul to East Sussex.

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Looking for the perfect weekend soundtrack? Love Supreme Jazz Festival kicks off on Friday! Who's joining for a soulful few days?

moments.title: Maverick Festival begins
moments.blurb: The UK's original Americana festival, Maverick Festival, takes place from July 3rd to 5th in Suffolk, celebrating roots music, dance, and culture.

angles.name: Americana Calling
angles.copy: Dust off your cowboy boots! Maverick Festival, the home of Americana in the UK, starts this Friday. Who's heading to Suffolk for some rootsy tunes?

angles.name: Unique Festival
angles.copy: Fancy something a bit different this weekend? Maverick Festival offers a unique blend of Americana music, dance, and workshops from Friday!

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow, July 1st.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday for tomorrow to the legendary Debbie Harry! What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Iconic Frontwoman
angles.copy: Still rocking after all these years! Wishing a very happy 81st birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry tomorrow. An absolute icon.

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday tomorrow, July 1st.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday for tomorrow to the incredible Missy Elliott. What's her ultimate anthem for you?

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a huge happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott tomorrow! A true pioneer who changed the game.

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Genius
angles.copy: A true synth-pop legend! Happy 66th Birthday to Vince Clarke on Wednesday. Depeche Mode, Yazoo, Erasure... what's his best project?

angles.name: Erasure Fan
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 66th birthday to the brilliant Vince Clarke this Wednesday! So many iconic tracks to his name.

moments.title: Shane Lynch turns 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone member Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyzone Fan
angles.copy: No Matter What, we're wishing a very Happy 50th Birthday to Boyzone's Shane Lynch this Wednesday! Can you believe he's 50?

angles.name: Half Century
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Shane Lynch of Boyzone this Wednesday! Time flies when you're making classic pop hits.

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone this Thursday! What's your go-to Posty track?

angles.name: Current Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to hitmaker Post Malone on Thursday! Still rocking the charts.

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square! Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Friday. What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News hit?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the fantastic Huey Lewis this Friday! Still bringing us the Power of Love.

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: Wu-Tang Clan leader and acclaimed producer RZA celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Master
angles.copy: Protect Ya Neck! Happy 57th Birthday to the iconic RZA of Wu-Tang Clan this Friday. A true hip-hop visionary.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to the legendary RZA this Friday! The mastermind behind some of hip-hop's greatest tracks.

moments.title: 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Go Shorty, It's Your Birthday! Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent this Saturday. What's your favourite track from the 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' era?

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a huge happy 51st birthday to the legendary 50 Cent this Saturday! Still an icon in music and beyond.

moments.title: John Keeble turns 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Gold! Always believe in your soul! Happy 67th Birthday to Spandau Ballet's John Keeble this Saturday. What's your favourite 80s classic from the band?

angles.name: Spandau Ballet Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the brilliant John Keeble, drummer of Spandau Ballet, this Saturday! An 80s legend.

moments.title: Kate Nash turns 39
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Kate Nash celebrates her 39th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the wonderful Kate Nash this Saturday! What's your favourite track from the British indie pop star?

angles.name: Indie Pop Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 39th birthday to the brilliant Kate Nash this Saturday! Still delivering those witty lyrics and catchy melodies.

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love this Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: 90s Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 62nd birthday to the iconic Courtney Love this Thursday! A true force in 90s rock.

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: The White Stripes frontman and acclaimed musician Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the brilliant Jack White this Thursday! From The White Stripes to solo brilliance, what's your top track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to the phenomenal Jack White this Thursday! Still one of the most exciting guitarists around.

moments.title: Jessica Simpson turns 46
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and businesswoman Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the multi-talented Jessica Simpson this Friday! What's your favourite track from her pop career?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 46th birthday to Jessica Simpson this Friday! Still a pop culture icon.
